verified.notes: Rhode Island offers multiple respite programs (CareBreaks, Lifespan Respite Care Program, Medicaid waivers). Phone number provided is for CareBreaks program. Eligibility criteria (age, income, assets) vary by specific program and are not uniformly specified in available sources. Income-based sliding scale exists but thresholds not disclosed in retrieved materials. Search results reference income/asset limits for specific waiver programs but do not provide exact current thresholds. No single authoritative .gov source consolidates all eligibility criteria across all respite programs.

programs.programName: Rhode Island Pharmaceutical Assistance for the Elderly (RIPAE)

verified.notes: No minimum age; levels for 65+ and 55-64 disabled. No assets test. Income limits tiered by level (e.g., Level 3 individual up to $83,510), but query format limits to two values. Official phone from .gov; secondary phones differ (4014623000, 4014624444). Data as of 2026 search.

verified.notes: Income limits calculated from 250% FPL cap. Most recent factsheet is from April 2024 (2024 PDF). Age 19-64 also eligible if diagnosed with Alzheimer's or related dementia. No asset limits apply to this program.
